meta.title: Air Force - Micro Air Vehicles
meta.description:
The Air Force has typically been known for it's large aircraft. However they have been doing intensive research and developed Air Vehicles that can be as small the size of a thumbnail. 
These are the future of intelligence gathering and are much harder to detect, combining sensors and cameras and have been mimicked on real birds. Advances are happening constantly to improve these vehicles beyond what we think is possible.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
